global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic interior scene of a comfortable Phoenix-area family living room in the late afternoon, with the AC clearly working — the room feels cool, calm, lived-in. A parent (woman, mid-30s, casual outfit, cropped at chest level so face is not the focal point) sits on a cream-colored fabric couch with her feet up on a cushioned ottoman, holding a coffee mug, head turned slightly down toward a child. A child of about 5 years old sits on a soft area rug on the floor in the foreground, playing with a small wooden block toy, fully absorbed. The room is decorated in warm Southwestern style — terracotta and cream tones, a woven blanket draped over the couch arm, a low wooden coffee table, indoor potted cactus near a large window. Through the window: a sliver of dry desert landscape and intense Phoenix afternoon sun outside, but the interior light is soft and cool. The room is comfortable, the family is comfortable, the AC is doing its job. A modern white wall thermostat is mounted on the wall in the middle ground, partially visible. Mood: this is what working AC actually feels like — relief, ease, normalcy. Photorealistic, shot on 35mm lens, natural soft indoor light.
global_context.time_of_day: late afternoon, soft indoor light, intense Phoenix sun outside the window
global_context.weather_atmosphere: interior cool and calm; exterior visibly hot through window

lighting.source: soft window light from camera-right + interior ambient
lighting.quality: soft, calm, slightly cool indoor temperature compared to the exterior glare visible through the window
lighting.color_temp: neutral warm interior, with hot exterior visible through window

composition.framing: medium-wide, capturing the couch, parent, child, and window
composition.depth_of_field: shallow-medium, parent and child in focus, background slightly soft
composition.focal_point: the relaxed parent on couch and the absorbed child playing

semantic_relationships: the family is RELAXED — that's the visual story; AC working = normal life
the contrast between intense sun outside the window and the calm cool interior reinforces the AC is doing its job
no chaos, no expense visible, no decision-making moment — just the result of a working system
Southwestern decor establishes Phoenix without leaning on cliches
